response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack and systems breadth, including low-latency DLang work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby and geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map. However, the role explicitly requires modern C++ (or Rust) expertise, and the resume shows only a brief early-career C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) with no recent C++ or Rust work. The geospatial background and distributed-systems exposure are relevant, but the core language requirement is a significant gap for a Senior SDE on a routing tiling pipeline.
strengths: Direct geospatial/GIS experience through GISCollective and Green Map work
Low-latency, high-throughput backend experience at Dunnhumby (millions of req/sec)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testability, open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal and dated C++ experience (~6 months in 2014-2015); no recent modern C++ or Rust
No demonstrated experience with production routing/navigation pipelines or tile generation
Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node/AI tooling, not systems-level data pipelines
